name: bridge-of-voices
description: 声音的桥 — 语音→法律文书AI助手

scripts.www: mkdir -p www && cp index.html manifest.json sw.js www/ && cp -r css js data assets www/
scripts.apk:setup: npm run www && npx cap add android
scripts.apk:sync: npm run www && npx cap sync
scripts.apk:build: npm run www && npx cap sync && npx cap open android

author: 万子轩
